title: SearchCustomization - Metadata API
description: Represents the configuration of search settings created in Search Manager. The configuration includes the search channel, searchable objects and fields, and rules to filter search results.

channel.description: The search channel that the configuration applies to.

objectToAlwaysSearch.description: A list of the objects that are always searched for the user profile if the search channel is Einstein Global Search Bar.

profile.description: Specifies user profile if the search channel is Einstein Global Search Bar.

selectedObject.description: A list of the objects that are selected in the configuration if the search channel is LWR Experience Sites.

selectedProfile.description: Specifies all user profiles that are associated with a Search configuration if the search channel is Einstein Global Search Bar. This field is available in API version 62.0 and later.

objectApiName.description: The API name of the object that the configuration is applied to.

rule.description: A list of rules applied to filter search results.

searchable.description: Indicates whether the object is searchable (true) or not (false).

fieldApiName.description: The API name of the field that the configuration is applied to.

searchable.description: Indicates whether the field is searchable (true) or not (false).

fieldApiName.description: The field that the rule applies to.

targetObjectApiName.description: The API name of the target object, in case the rule applies to a lookup field.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="SearchCustomization">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="channel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="objectOverride" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:SearchCustomizationObjectOverride"/>
        <xsd:element name="objectToAlwaysSearch" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="selectedObject" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="selectedProfile" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="SearchCustomizationExplicitFilter">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fieldPath" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="type" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="SearchCustomizationFieldOverride">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fieldApiName" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="searchable" type="xsd:boolean"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="SearchCustomizationObjectOverride">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="explicitFilter" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:SearchCustomizationExplicitFilter"/>
    <xsd:element name="fieldOverride" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:SearchCustomizationFieldOverride"/>
    <xsd:element name="objectApiName" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="rule" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:SearchCustomizationRule"/>
    <xsd:element name="searchable" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="SearchCustomizationRule">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fieldApiName" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="operator" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="ruleValue" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:SearchCustomizationRuleValue"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="SearchCustomizationRuleValue">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="targetObjectApiName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="value" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```
